title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Oden, Unknown person #8 as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the ten of us will enter this pot.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you shall free the ones who survive...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The time you decide!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Lord open!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Survie?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The point of this punishment is that you die instantly! MuAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Bring me a clock!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You have one hour!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WORORO RORO!! Try to survive that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's even too long for a regular bath!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You will hold your word?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Of course!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: even on the brink of death, he still jokes around.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have something else to do. Get in already!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He will be disgraceful until the end.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: LilDiana: Yeah,!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We can't leave our master alone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: See you all in the next world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Get on this punk, you guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Lord Oden!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Please stop this, Lord Oden!!!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: It should be us, Lord Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We will carry you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut up and stay still. That's an order!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Lord Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's the Deal here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: His retainers aren't submerged in oil!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WORO RO RO RO RO RO RO RO RO!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: but all ten of them are in the pot! I have no complaints!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's carrying nine well built samural like that!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just to do that, he must have colossal strength. What a waste...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and to do a feat like that in boiling oil...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Lord open...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 36 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
